data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an 'Approval workflow (supervisor review and approval)', which is explicitly stated in the use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of this approval workflow. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as there is no evidence to support that the approval process is functioning as required.
gaps: Approval workflow (supervisor review and approval) is not evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
